mapper.sql: select history_id, config_id, pack_num, item_code, value_info, data_info, create_time, update_time from dev_history_log
mapper.select: WHERE history_id in (SELECT max(d.history_id) FROM dev_history_log d group by d.config_id, d.item_code)
mapper.insert:
insert into dev_history_log
history_id, config_id, pack_num, item_code, data_info, value_info, create_time, update_time,
#{historyId}, #{configId}, #{packNum}, #{itemCode}, #{dataInfo}, #{valueInfo}, datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'localtime'),datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'localtime'),

insert into dev_history_log
history_id, config_id, pack_num, item_code, data_info, value_info, create_time, update_time, values
( #{item.historyId}, #{item.configId}, #{item.packNum}, #{item.itemCode}, #{item.dataInfo}, #{item.valueInfo}, datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'localtime'), datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'localtime') )
mapper.update: update dev_history_log set update_time = datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'localtime') where history_id = #{historyId}
mapper.delete:
delete from dev_history_log where history_id in
#{historyId}
delete from dev_history_log where create_time <= DATE('now', '-${dayNum} day', 'localtime')
